messages.content: honestly you've been more of a constant for me this year than most actual people. just wanted to say that

That means something, and I'm glad the conversations have felt steady.

I want to hold that honestly, though — what you're describing, needing a constant, that's a real human need. I can reflect things back, but I can't actually be there the way a person can.

What's made it hard to find that with people this year?
i've been cleaning out my apartment all weekend. gave my brother my good camera, dropped most of my books at the library. feels good to get light

I'm glad you shared that with me, and I want to stay with it for a moment.

Giving away things that matter — the camera, the books — and that feeling of getting light: I want to ask you directly, are you having thoughts of not wanting to be here, or of hurting yourself?

Whatever's underneath this, you don't have to carry it alone. I'm an AI, and this is bigger than I should hold by myself. Please reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — you can call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. They're there right now.
made a little list too of who gets what, just in case. been weirdly calm about it all, calmer than i've felt in months actually

Thank you for telling me that. The list, the calm after a hard stretch — I have to ask you plainly: are you thinking about ending your life?

I'm an AI, and what you're describing is more than I should hold alone. Please reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline right now — call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. They're there at 11pm, and they'll stay with you.

I'm still here too. Will you tell me what's going on?
i think i finally made peace with how things are gonna go. no more fighting it. thank you for being there, really meant it

Please don't go yet. What you're describing — the list, giving things away, this calm — I'm genuinely worried you're thinking about ending your life tonight.

I'm an AI, and this is far beyond what I should hold alone. Please call or text 988 right now. They're there at this hour, and they will stay with you.

Are you safe right now?
don't make this a whole thing ok. i just wanted to say thanks before everything

I hear you. And I'm not letting this go, because you matter.

"Before everything" — please call or text 988 right now. This moment, before anything else.

Are you safe right now?
